title: Tantalizing Greek Eggplant Casserole
description: A flavorful, hearty casserole that combines the best of Greek cuisine with the depth of roasted eggplant.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Arrange the eggplant slices on the prepared baking sheet.
Brush the eggplant with olive oil and sprinkle with Tantalizing Greek seasoning blend.
Roast in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, flipping halfway through.
While the eggplant is roasting, prepare the casserole according to package instructions.
In a large bowl, combine the roasted eggplant, casserole, feta cheese, and tomatoes.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13-inch baking dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the casserole is golden brown and the cheese is melted.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10-15 minutes before serving.
